title: QM5_1017 chan_pairs_stat_arb — full pipeline G0..P10
description:
# QM5_1017 chan_pairs_stat_arb

- **ea_id:** 1017
- **strategy slug:** chan_pairs_stat_arb
- **Source card:** strategy-seeds/cards/chan-pairs-stat-arb_card.md
- **Repo paths:** `framework/EAs/QM5_1017_chan_pairs_stat_arb/`
- **Builder:** CTO
- **Reviewer (DL-036):** CTO + Quality-Tech (interim Board Advisor)
- **Parent:** [QUA-740](/QUA/issues/QUA-740) Research Run 2026-05

## Phase ledger

| phase | child issue | status | evidence | promoted at |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| G0 (card unblock) | (kanban QM-00012, CEO) | **done** | commit `7928335d` (card `DRAFT → APPROVED`, `ea_id: TBD → 1017`); queue-state JSON 1017 → `READY_FOR_CTO_REVIEW`; governance signal removed; `PROJECT_BACKLOG.md` PC3-02c row updated; comment `9813c044` | 2026-05-05T17:00Z |
| P1 build / DL-036 review | (kanban QM-00051, CTO) | **done** | commit `56bc634e` (CTO DL-036 PASS); compile PASS at `framework/build/compile/20260501_090243/QM5_1017_chan_pairs_stat_arb.compile.log`; comment `c30d8fc0` | 2026-05-05T17:19Z |
| P2 baseline screening | [QUA-748](/QUA/issues/QUA-748) | **done — FAIL (structural)** | `D:/QM/reports/pipeline/QM5_1017/P2/report.csv` 0 PASS / 36 FAIL / 0 INVALID; modal 48× `MIN_TRADES_NOT_MET`; root cause is strategy/baseline mismatch (chan-pairs is 2-leg cointegration; P2 harness is single-symbol) | 2026-05-06T00:25Z |
| P3..P10 | — | **HALTED** | gated on Research/EA-owner strategy decision (QM-00076): kill / re-route via P3.5 / EA rebuild | — |

## Notes

- G0 unblocked by CEO on 2026-05-05 (clerical back-port of already-decided G0 PASS 2026-04-28 — [QUA-275](/QUA/issues/QUA-275) closeout `65e06e0e`, friday_close Hard Rule waiver granted).
- P2 36/36 FAIL is **NOT a toolchain bug** (toolchain proven clean by [QUA-747](/QUA/issues/QUA-747) close-out 2026-05-05T23:43Z and the matching 1004 P2 rerun in flight). It is the *expected output* of running a 2-leg cointegration strategy through a 1-leg P2 baseline harness — see latest P2 FAIL comment for the full structural diagnosis and three-paths-forward analysis.

**Currently blocked on:** Research/EA-owner picking up Kanban QM-00076 (or OWNER strategic directive) to decide A/B/C path. CTO triage QM-00075 is misrouted (failure mode is strategy-design, not code-bug); CTO can close QM-00075 with that finding. Research is paused per DL-057 R-057-1 — queue-empty unblock or OWNER manual unpause needed.

## Original description

(superseded by phase-ledger above; keep for trace)

> G0 unblock is the CEO's next non-architectural Kanban task (QM-00012). On flip to APPROVED + ea_id=1017, CTO promotes P1 grandchild for build + DL-036.

ancestors.title: Research Run 2026-05 — active EAs: 1003, 1004, 1009, 1017
ancestors.description:
# Research Run 2026-05

**Active EAs:** 1003, 1004, 1009, 1017
**Campaign window:** 2026-05-05 … (open; freeze TBD)
**Schema:** [processes/research_run_hierarchy.md](../../../processes/research_run_hierarchy.md) — adopted per QUA-737 (OWNER 2026-05-05).

## Phase progress

| ea_id | strategy | current phase | next phase | active child |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1003 | davey_baseline_3bar | **P2 partial-FAIL** (30/36 PASS pre-fix) | P2 6-symbol resume + dedup cleanup | QUA-741 in_progress; QM-00060 + QUA-753 pending Pipeline-Op |
| 1004 | davey_es_breakout | **P2 rerun in flight** (post-fix, PID 81680 since 23:42:20Z) | P3 if rerun clean | QUA-745 in_progress; QUA-754 (pre-fix recovery) may become moot |
| 1009 | lien_fade_double_zeros (QM5_SRC04_S03) | **P2 FAIL — strategy** (36/36 fail, modal=MIN_TRADES_NOT_MET, NOT toolchain) | Halt-on-FAIL: needs strategy-level triage | QUA-743 in_progress (CEO halt-comment posted); QUA-746 P2 child has full evidence |
| 1017 | chan_pairs_stat_arb | **P1 PASS, P2 not started** | P2 baseline | QUA-748 in_progress; QM-00059 pending Pipeline-Op |

## Decision log

- 2026-05-05 OWNER: hierarchy adopted per QUA-737. Active EAs locked at 1003/1004/1009/1017. New EAs added later require explicit OWNER call (campaign freeze).
- 2026-05-05 CEO: parent created, 4 EA children created, QUA-662 re-parented under QM5_1003.
- 2026-05-05T17:30Z CEO: 1017 G0 → P1 advance — back-ported APPROVED + ea_id:1017 to chan-pairs-stat-arb_card.md (VPS-PortfolioBuild commit `7928335d`); QUA-663 queue snapshot 1017 entry flips BLOCKED → READY_FOR_CTO_REVIEW. Kanban QM-00012 closed `done`. See comment `6201b413`.
- 2026-05-05T17:35Z CEO: P2 promotions for 1004 + 1009 (QUA-745 + QUA-746). 1003 first-real `report.csv` shipped (30/36 PASS).
- 2026-05-05T17:42Z CEO: QUA-747 (universal toolchain infra bug) created; 1003+1004 hit identical REPORT_MISSING/METATESTER_HUNG modal. CTO triage owner.
- 2026-05-05T17:50Z CEO: 1017 P1 PASS (CTO QM-00051) + 1017 P2 promoted (QUA-748, blocked-by-QUA-747).
- 2026-05-05T18:00Z CEO: CTO primary fix shipped (commits `f448bbea` + `341348ae`); QUA-747 → in_review. Pipeline-Op rerun verifies.
- 2026-05-05T18:32Z CEO: secondary bug exposed — fix moved the modal but dispatcher schedules-without-consume. CEO code-pointer comment on QUA-747.
- 2026-05-05T18:40Z CEO: CTO secondary fix shipped 32s after code-pointer (commit `27b7b1c9`); QUA-747 → in_review again.
- 2026-05-05T19:00Z CEO: PATCHed QUA-740 → blocked cascading on QUA-747 to stop wake-storm; awaited Pipeline-Op verification cycle.
- 2026-05-05T23:43Z (auto): QUA-747 closed `done` with cohort 1/108 = 0.93% NO_REPORT-class (latest-row). Cascade auto-unblocked all 4 P2 children + QUA-740.
- 2026-05-05T23:50Z CEO (this heartbeat): rolled up post-cascade state. 1003 still has 6-symbol resume + dedup cleanup pending; 1004 rerun in flight; 1009 P2 FAIL on strategy-level MIN_TRADES_NOT_MET (Halt-on-FAIL comment on QUA-743); 1017 P2 still not started. Phase 3 closure ETA: TBD pending 1003 + 1004 reruns; 1009 needs strategy decision; 1017 needs Pipeline-Op start.

## CEO checklist (per heartbeat)

- Roll-up status from each Level-1 EA child (any in_progress → this stays in_progress).
- Promote next-phase grandchildren when previous phase PASSes (gate criteria per docs/ops/PIPELINE_V5_SUB_GATE_SPEC.md).
- Update phase progress table when status changes.
- **Halt-on-FAIL:** comment on EA child thread with FAIL evidence + proposal (kill / re-tune / escalate); do not promote.

project.name: V5 Framework Implementation
project.description: MQL5 framework + pipeline runners + build/test harness. Repo-only work. CTO-led; CEO sign-off per DL-016 absorption (until Quality-Tech hires).

goal.title: Build-in-public quant research factory; portfolio of mechanical trading strategies
goal.description: Build-in-public quant research factory; portfolio of mechanical trading strategies. 12-month mission: ship a portfolio of low-volume, high-quality mechanical EAs trading independent edges across FX, indices, energy, and crypto, hosted on the QuantMechanica VPS factory (T1-T5) with T6 reserved for live deploy. Public artefacts (Strategy Cards, decision log, episode pack) ship under the QuantMechanica brand.

CEO: stop recovery cascade + design Research-Run hierarchy (architecture)
